artists.name: Michelangelo
artists.intro: Thirty works and ensembles across eighteen places. Use the map to find where the originals are held today.
artists.tripSummary: Florence and Rome contain the largest concentrations, but original works can also be found in London, Paris, Bruges, Milan, New York and elsewhere.

artists.name: Johannes Vermeer
artists.intro: Thirty-five paintings across collections in Europe, the United States and Japan. Explore where Vermeer’s surviving works are held today.
artists.tripSummary: The Hague and Amsterdam are natural starting points, with important groups also in New York, Washington, London, Berlin and Dresden.
